title: laurus cyathiformis
intro: Laurus cyathiformis, also known as the Indian laurel, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Laurus cyathiformis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Laurus cyathiformis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
